displayTitle: X-Wing Rogue Squadron #16: The Warrior Princess, Part 4
synopsis: This man making a bid for the throne of the Royal Citadel of Eiattu—this man who would lead the People's Liberation Battalion to rule this world—claims to be the brother of the current ruler, Princess Plourr. But Plourr knows—with great certainty—that this cannot be. To reveal the truth might destroy his power, but it could, in turn, destroy her as well.
title: X-Wing Rogue Squadron #16: The Warrior Princess, Part 4
